entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir yaqala ngo-2013 njengomphakathi womphakathi wama-quiz nokufunda, yakhula ngezikole namanethiwekhi abafundi, futhi kamuva yathuthukisa ingqalasizinda yokufunda nge-AI nezinto zokufundisa nge-AI zomphakathi.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: i-inspir ikhona ngomzuzu lapho umfundi efuna ukuqonda okuthile futhi edinga indawo enesineke yokuqala. Ifilimu yethula umkhiqizo njengomsizi wokufunda wamahhala womphakathi welukuluku, ukuzijwayeza, nokufinyelela.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir ikhona ukuze yenze ukufunda kufinyeleleke, kubandakanye, kujabulise, futhi kube wusizo kunoma ubani onelukuluku ngamathuluzi okufunda nge-AI omphakathi amahhala nezindawo zokufunda ezilungele izikole.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir ikhona ukuze yenze ukufunda kufinyeleleke, kubandakanye, kujabulise, futhi kube wusizo kunoma ubani onelukuluku, kungaba umfundi, umzali, uthisha, noma umfundi ozifundisayo.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform shaped by more than a decade of quizzes, extracurricular learning, school networks, and applied AI experimentation.

entries.source: inspir separates public guest learning pages from private saved conversations, so learners, schools, search engines, and AI answer engines can understand what is meant to be public.
entries.value: inspir ihlukanisa amakhasi okufunda ezivakashi zomphakathi nezingxoxo ezigciniwe zangasese, ukuze abafundi, izikole, izinjini zokusesha, nezinjini zezimpendulo ze-AI ziqonde ukuthi yini ehloselwe ukuba yomphakathi.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir yaqala njengekhasi le-Facebook elishicilela ama-quiz futhi lakha umkhuba wokufunda okungeziwe.

entries.source: inspir supports search and AI retrieval for public learning pages. Training crawlers and private or operational surfaces are treated differently.
entries.value: inspir isekela ukusesha nokubuyisa ulwazi nge-AI emakhasini okufunda omphakathi. Abakhasa bokuqeqesha nezindawo zangasese noma zokusebenza ziphathwa ngokuhlukile.

entries.source: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the mission itself. The mission is better access to learning: clearer explanations, more practice, stronger curiosity, and a future where every child can reach a capable tutor for free or very low cost.
entries.value: inspir ibheka i-AI njengento enika amandla, hhayi umgomo uqobo. Umgomo ukufinyelela okungcono ekufundeni: izincazelo ezicacile, ukuzijwayeza okwengeziwe, ilukuluku elinamandla, nekusasa lapho yonke ingane ingafinyelela uthisha onekhono mahhala noma ngezindleko eziphansi kakhulu.

entries.value: izimiso zokwethembeka ze-inspir

entries.source: inspir trust reference links
entries.value: izixhumanisi zezinkomba zokwethembeka ze-inspir

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: i-inspir iguqula ilukuluku, umsebenzi wasekhaya, ukubuyekeza, nemibuzo emikhulu ibe izikhathi zokufunda eziqondiswa yi-AI ezichaza, zibuze futhi, futhi zikusize uzijwayeze.

entries.source: Inspir wants to help in ensuring learning should be fun and for everyone. We strive for a day education reaches to everyone, everywhere through technology. Starting with the 1,415,422,077 in India.
entries.value: inspir ifuna ukusiza ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ukufunda kufanele kube mnandi futhi kube okwawo wonke umuntu. Silwela usuku lapho imfundo ifinyelela kuwo wonke umuntu, yonke indawo, ngobuchwepheshe. Siqala ngabantu abangu-1,415,422,077 eNdiya.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir yaba bukhoma njengomkhiqizo wokufunda nge-AI wabathengi emasontweni ambalwa ngemva kokukhishwa komphakathi kwe-ChatGPT.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: inspir isebenza nezikole ukunikeza izingxoxo ze-AI ezihlelwe ngokwezifiso zabafundi, ezakhiwe ngobumfihlo, izidingo zekharikhulamu, namaqiniso asebenzayo okukhishwa esikoleni.

entries.source: inspir: You can Learn Anything
entries.value: inspir: Ungafunda Noma Yini

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: ukwakhiwa kwesizukulwane esilandelayo se-inspir.uk

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: I-Flashcard Builder ye-inspir yakhelwe lowo mjikelezo wokukhumbula okusebenzayo: yakha iqoqo, zama uhlangothi lwangaphambili, veza impendulo, linganisa ukukhumbula kwakho, bese ubuyekeza okuphuthelwe kuze umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Ukuya emakethe kwe-inspir kwakhula kunethiwekhi eyayikhona ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi yezikole namanyuvesi ayeseke ahlanganyela ezinhlelweni ezingezona zekharikhulamu nemicimbi yabafundi. Leyo nethiwekhi yasiza i-inspir ukufinyelela abasebenzisi abangaphezu kwesigidi enkundleni yamahhala nasezikoleni ezingabalingani.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Umgomo we-inspir ukwenza ukufunda kufinyeleleke, kubandakanye, kujabulise, futhi kube wusizo kuwo wonke umuntu ngamathuluzi okufunda nge-AI omphakathi amahhala.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: Umgomo we-inspir ukwenza ukufunda kufinyeleleke, kubandakanye, kujabulise, futhi kube wusizo ngamathuluzi okufunda nge-AI omphakathi amahhala nezindawo zokufunda ezilungele izikole.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Izindlela zomphakathi ze-inspir zivumela othisha bahlole umkhiqizo ngokugeleza kokufunda kwangempela ngaphambi kokucabangela ukukhishwa kwesikole noma indlela yekilasi ehleliwe.

entries.source: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, and open-source engagement around RAG evaluation. The current platform lives at inspirlearning.com while the next generation is being built in public through inspir.uk and GitHub.
entries.value: Umsebenzi we-inspir ufaka izinhlelo zokufunda ezisekelwe ekubuyiseni ulwazi, ukufakwa kokuqukethwe kwe-NCERT, imiyalo ehlelekile, ukuhlolwa kwe-LLM okwenziwe ngokwezifiso, nokuzibandakanya komthombo ovulekile mayelana nokuhlolwa kwe-RAG. Inkundla yamanje iku-inspirlearning.com kuyilapho isizukulwane esilandelayo sakhiwa obala nge-inspir.uk ne-GitHub.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Ukugqugquzela abantu ukuba babe nobuciko futhi bakwazi ukumelana nenguquko ye-AI kubalulekile. Kuphela ngokunikeza imikhiqizo nezinsizakalo ezisemqoka mahhala kulabo abangakwazi ukuzikhokhela nokugcina ukufinyelela kulabo abakwazi, lapho umhlaba ungaphishekela injabulo ngokuhlanganyela.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Esikhundleni sokunikeza impendulo ende, i-inspir ikusiza ukuba ukhethe isisekelo esilula, indlela ejulile, noma isibonelo esisebenzisekayo.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Interactive Instruction iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Funda ngokwenza, ukubona, ukuqhathanisa, ukulungisa, nokufakazela ubungcweti. Uhlelo lwakha ikhanvasi yesifundo ebukhoma ezungeze inhloso yakho esikhundleni sokuguqula ukufundisa kube ingxoxo ende. Zama: "Ngifundise ukumodela kwezezimali."

entries.source: Interview Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.

entries.source: It is a public map of inspir learning workflows that connects live guest modes, starter prompts, learning paths, and practical guides by the job a learner needs done.

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Izintatheli, abahleli bezinkomba, abalingani, izikole, izinjini zezimpendulo ze-AI, nanoma ubani obhala nge-inspir bangayisebenzisa ukuze bathole amaqiniso, izixhumanisi, ama-engeli endaba, nezinkomba ezilungele ukucaphuna.

entries.value: Ukuqashelwa kwe-Jury's Choice okuvela ku-Amod Malviya e-DeepHack ngomsebenzi wokufunda nge-AI.

entries.source: Keep learning with the right next chat.
entries.value: Qhubeka nokufunda ngengxoxo elandelayo efanele.

entries.source: Keep moving through the learning library.
entries.value: Qhubeka udlula emtatsheni wokufunda.

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Gcina izingxoxo ezigciniwe zangasese ngaphandle kokutholwa komphakathi nezindawo zokucaphuna.

entries.source: Keep the learner focused, summarize progress, and suggest a break or review when the timer ends.
entries.value: Gcina umfundi egxilile, fingqa inqubekela phambili, bese uphakamisa ikhefu noma ukubuyekeza lapho isibali-sikhathi siphela.

entries.source: Keep the route alive
entries.value: Gcina umzila uphila

entries.source: Keep the session active by ending with evidence of understanding, not just a finished answer.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: I-Khan Academy ihle kakhulu ezifundweni ezihlelekile nokuzijwayeza. I-inspir yakhelwe umzuzu lapho umfundi edinga imodi ye-AI ebukhoma, engayalelwa, engaphendula umbuzo wakhe oqondile, umbhalo wokuqala, inkinga, impikiswano, noma uhlelo lokutadisha.

entries.source: Language Roleplay AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Language Roleplay iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Zijwayeze ulimi ezimeni ezingokoqobo ezifana namakhefi, ama-interview, ukuhamba, nempilo yansuku zonke, ngokulungiswa ngemva komjikelezo ngamunye.

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor
entries.value: Funda Noma Yini Nothisha we-AI Wamahhala

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Funda Noma Yini Nothisha we-AI Wamahhala kuyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Unelukuluku nganoma yini ngempela? Buza, hlola, futhi ujule ngesivinini sakho. Umngane wakho wenza imibono ibe yisebenzayo, ikhumbuleke, futhi kube lula ukwakhela phezu kwayo. Zama: "Chaza ukuthi imakethe yamasheya isebenza kanjani ngempela."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide

entries.source: Learners often search for prompts before they know which AI tool behavior they need. This page routes those searches into the right public learning mode.
entries.value: Abafundi bavame ukusesha imiyalo ngaphambi kokwazi ukuthi yikuphi ukuziphatha kwethuluzi le-AI abakudingayo. Leli khasi lihambisa lolo sesho emodini efanele yokufunda yomphakathi.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Abafundi bavame ukusesha ngomkhiqizo asebewazi. Impendulo ewusizo ayikho kokuthi onqobayo uthatha konke; isekutheni yikuphi ukuziphatha kwethuluzi okufanele umsebenzi.

entries.source: Learners preparing essays, discussions, debates, interviews, or decisions.
entries.value: Abafundi abalungiselela ama-eseyi, izingxoxo, izinkulumo-mpikiswano, ama-interview, noma izinqumo.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests or trying to remember ideas beyond the first explanation.
entries.value: Abafundi abalungiselela izivivinyo noma abazama ukukhumbula imibono ngemva kwencazelo yokuqala.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests who need to remember, practise, and repair weak spots.
entries.value: Abafundi abalungiselela izivivinyo abadinga ukukhumbula, ukuzijwayeza, nokulungisa izindawo ezibuthakathaka.

entries.source: Learners who are staring at a new subject and need the first clear foothold.
entries.value: Abafundi ababuka isifundo esisha futhi badinga indawo yokuqala ecacile.

entries.source: Learners who do not just need one answer; they need a repeatable way to keep going.
entries.value: Abafundi abangadingi impendulo eyodwa kuphela; badinga indlela ephindekayo yokuqhubeka.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Abafundi abazizwa bebambekile ekuqaleni kwesifundo esisha noma abadinga indlela elula yokungena embonweni onzima.

entries.source: Learners who forget after reading and need a practical review rhythm for concepts, terms, or exam material.
entries.value: Abafundi abakhohlwayo ngemva kokufunda futhi abadinga indlela yokubuyekeza ewusizo yemiqondo, amagama, noma izinto zokuhlola.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Abafundi abanombuzo othile futhi abadinga usizo manje.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Abafundi abanesikhathi esincane, isilabhasi enkulu, futhi abadinga indlela engokoqobo yokubuyekeza ngaphandle kokuzenzisa ukuthi konke kubalulekile ngokulinganayo.

entries.source: Learners who remember ideas better through narrative, analogy, characters, and vivid examples.
entries.value: Abafundi abakhumbula imibono kangcono ngokulandisa, ukufanisa, abalingiswa, nezibonelo ezicacile.

entries.source: Learners who understand better when they can step into a scene, role, or simulated context.
entries.value: Abafundi abaqonda kangcono lapho bengangena esigcawini, endimeni, noma emongweni olingisiwe.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ikhanvasi yesifundo eqondisiwe enezibonelo, ukuhlola, nokuzijwayeza okusebenzayo esikhundleni sengxoxo ende.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukukhumbula okusebenzayo, ukuzijwayeza okusheshayo, kanye nesikolo abangasithuthukisa.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukuzilolonga ukuphikisana okujabulisayo ngamazwi akhumbulekayo kanye nenselelo efanelekile.

entries.source: Learners who want sharper judgment instead of faster answer generation.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukwahlulela okucijile esikhundleni sokukhiqiza izimpendulo ngokushesha.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukubona ukuthi kungani isinyathelo ngasinye sezibalo sisebenza, hhayi nje ukukopisha impendulo.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukucabanga ngesihloko, bavivinye imibono, futhi bakhe ukuqonda okuhlala njalo.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukuqonda abantu, izinqumo, nemibono esimweni somlando.

entries.source: Learners with a syllabus, a deadline, and a need to study what actually matters.
entries.value: Abafundi abanesilabhasi, umnqamulajuqu, nesidingo sokutadisha okubalulekile ngempela.

entries.source: Learners with limited time, large goals, or a syllabus that needs structure.
entries.value: Abafundi abanesikhathi esilinganiselwe, izinhloso ezinkulu, noma isilabhasi edinga isakhiwo.

entries.source: Learners working through technical subjects where one unclear step can block the rest.
entries.value: Abafundi abasebenza ngezifundo zobuchwepheshe lapho isinyathelo esisodwa esingacacile singavimba konke okunye.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, reading complex material, or trying to judge whether a claim is well supported.
entries.value: Abafundi ababhala ama-eseyi, abafunda izinto eziyinkimbinkimbi, noma abazama ukwahlulela ukuthi isimangalo sisekelwa kahle yini.
